name: TEM-24 | Empty state — no entries shown for user with no data
description: Verify that a user with no logged entries sees the empty state message on the Dashboard instead of entries.
descriptionHtml: Verify that a user with no logged entries sees the empty state message on the Dashboard instead of entries.
